request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw a local community meeting where they discussed civil defense preparedness. It was eye-opening how unprepared our neighborhoods are. We need to push for better funding and resources to ensure everyone knows what to do in an emergency. It's not about fear—it's about being responsible and looking out for each other. #CommunitySafety #CivilDefense
